---
title: "aisdk.providers"
subtitle: "Additional Model Provider Adapters"
---

Long-tail, OpenAI-compatible and Anthropic-compatible provider adapters for the
core `aisdk` toolkit. Providers register themselves with the core provider
registry on load, so they are resolvable through the `provider:model` syntax.

Covers **DeepSeek**, **Moonshot/Kimi**, **Stepfun**, **Volcengine**,
**AiHubMix**, **xAI**, **OpenRouter**, **Bailian**, and **NVIDIA**.

- **Status:** CRAN submission in progress
- **Source:** [github.com/YuLab-SMU/aisdk.providers](https://github.com/YuLab-SMU/aisdk.providers)

## Install

```r
install.packages("aisdk.providers")
# dev: pak::pak("YuLab-SMU/aisdk.providers")
```

## Example

```r
library(aisdk.providers)   # registers deepseek, kimi, xai, ... on load

chat <- create_chat_session("deepseek:deepseek-chat")
generate_text(chat, "Hello from DeepSeek!")
```
